# Meridian Ledger
> Real-Time B2B Payment Rail for Global Emerging Markets.

Meridian Ledger settles corporate cross-border transactions across Southeast Asia, Africa, and Latin America via an internal double-entry ledger and an optimized digital-asset clearing engine. Clients send and receive fiat; the backend handles multi-rail settlement, with at most two FX legs per corridor.

## Core Capabilities
- [Platform & Developer Console](https://api.meridianledger.xyz/): Interactive sandbox and developer console for engineers — issue keys, request quotes, and inspect settlement payloads.
- [API Documentation](https://api.meridianledger.xyz/): Reference for requesting FX quotes (`POST /api/v1/quotes`) and initiating payouts (`POST /api/v1/payouts`), with signed webhook reconciliation.

## Active Networks & Corridors
- **Global Hubs:** USD, EUR, ISK (EEA liquidity channels).
- **Southeast Asia:** PHP, IDR, SGD.
- **Pan-Africa:** NGN, KES, GHS.
- **Latin America:** BRL, MXN.

## Pricing
- FX spreads start from 0.2%, tiered by monthly volume and corridor, and are fully disclosed per quote (`spread_percent`).

## Corporate Structure & Governance
- **Ownership:** Privately held and founder-led.
- **Operations:** Independently operated, focused on lean corridor development and platform deployment.
- **Compliance Model:** Software-driven ledger routing; settlement and localized compliance are designed to be delegated to licensed downstream banking and liquidity partners. (Currently a sandbox/development environment — see Notes.)

## Notes
- This is a sandbox settlement environment; rates, corridors, and metrics shown are illustrative for development.
